prestazioni: Engine swap to a 1UR-FSE 5.0L V8 (from the Lexus LS 600h) with a custom forced-induction setup using a Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger, paired with a Tomei 87mm titanium exhaust manifold and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power Racing Spec. The ECU is replaced with a Link G4X Storm Black with a custom Century SUV-specific calibration map, including a Motec M150 for auxiliary control of a port-injection system using ID1000 injectors and a secondary high-pressure fuel pump by Walbro 450 LPH.

Suspension overhaul with a full Ohlins Road & Track coilover kit (Century SUV-specific valving), paired with custom subframe reinforcement plates by Buddy Club and a Whiteline front sway bar (27mm adjustable) with poly bushings. The rear multi-link suspension is upgraded with SuperPro polyurethane bushings and spherical bearings for improved rigidity and response.

Drivetrain upgrades include a OS Giken Super Lock LSD (4.30 final drive ratio) in a custom-built TRD GRMN-spec 8-speed automatic transmission with a Level 10 valve body and a PWR high-performance transmission cooler. The driveshaft is replaced with a carbon fiber unit by Driveshaft Shop, and the rear differential is reinforced with a Cusco 2-way LSD and a custom aluminum differential cover by Varis.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny Pandem widebody kit (Century SUV-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front bumper canards, and a rear diffuser by Seibon Carbon. The kit includes a custom front splitter with integrated air curtains and a rear wing by Veilside Fortune III (modified for Century SUV dimensions).

Custom interior reupholstery by Katzkin using ultra-premium Nappa leather with Alcantara accents, including a full dashboard wrap in carbon fiber by VIS Racing, a custom roll cage by Cusco (bolt-in, 8-point), and Recaro SP-G seats with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses. The steering wheel is replaced with a Momo Prototipo (350mm) wrapped in Alcantara with a custom Century emblem.

Exterior lighting upgrades include a full LED conversion by Diode Dynamics (including sequential turn signals), a custom laser-cut grille insert by Meshworks (brushed aluminum finish), and a set of Work Meister S1 3P wheels (20x10 +25 front, 20x11 +30 rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/35/20 front, 295/30/20 rear). The wheels are finished with custom titanium lug nuts by Muteki.
